\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3443 introduces Full Cosmological Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \Lambda = \frac{B^2}{\mu_0 \rho \eta \omega} \approx 1 $$
